title: Paper Players
description: Turns any player into a piece of paper like in Paper Mario.
body:
# **Paper Players**

This resource pack changes the player's model so that it looks like a cardboard cutout or something from paper mario. This pack works for all player models. It works with the elytra and caps but not armour.
![How it looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1c795f8ae64f09b7cb6b7395514edb4f38ca532.jpeg)
## **Outline**
This pack also allows the player to have a coloured outline if you wish to make it feel more like Paper Mario. How to set up the Outline:

![How to set up the Outline.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0877398f3f41a412c28f98cedaa8059f5cbc49da.png)

## **Mods NEEDED**
This pack **REQUIRES** any form of Entity Models Features(EMF) to work.

### Mods Recommend:

**Entity Model/Texture Features**

[https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

**Optifine (Not Tested)**

[https://optifine.net/home](https://optifine.net/home)
